parameters.query: SELECT id, apartment_id, COALESCE(apartment_name,'') AS apartment_name, to_char(checkin_at,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS checkin_at, to_char(checkout_at,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS checkout_at, status FROM bookings WHERE id = '{{ $json.booking_id }}' LIMIT 1;

UPDATE bookings SET guest_chat_id = {{ $json.chat_id }}, guest_telegram_id = {{ $json.telegram_user_id }}, guest_username = '{{ ($json.username || '').toString().replace(/\'/g, "''") }}', guest_first_name = '{{ ($json.first_name || '').toString().replace(/\'/g, "''") }}', guest_last_name = '{{ ($json.last_name || '').toString().replace(/\'/g, "''") }}', guest_joined_at = NOW(), guest_opt_in_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = '{{ $json.booking.id }}';
SELECT value FROM system_vars WHERE key='owner_chat_id' LIMIT 1;
